CTN 4, 110 [Lipšur litany][via cams/gkab]

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

[...] KUR x x x x

[...] the land of [...].

Obverse
o 1o 1

da-nu-um u dan-⸢tu₄⸣

lip-šur DINGIR-⸢MEŠ⸣ [...]

May Anu and Antu absolve, the [...] gods;

o 22

dEN.LIL₂

lip-šur ša₂ [...]-⸢nu?⸣-u₂ x x

May Elill absolve, who [...] ...;

o 33

dNIN.LIL₂

lip-šur šar-rat ⸢E₂⸣.[KI].⸢UR₃.RA⸣

May Ninlil absolve, queen of Ekiur;

o 44

dEN.NU.⸢GI⸣

lip-šur GU.ZA.LA₂ dEN.LIL₂

May Ennugi absolve, throne-bearer of Ellil;

o 55

dPAP.SUKKAL

lip-šur SUKKAL DINGIR-MEŠ GAL-MEŠ

May Papsukkal absolve, minister of the great gods;

o 66

[...]

lip-šur x E₂.⸢KUR⸣

May [...] absolve, ... of Ekur;

o 77

[...]

⸢lip-šur⸣ ina ⸢ABZU?⸣

May [...] absolve, in Apsu;

o 88

[dDAM].KI.NA

lip-šur a-ši-⸢bat⸣ [...] IGI [...] x

May Damkina absolve, who dwells in [...] ... [...] ...;

o 99

[...] x

lip-šur x [...]

May [...] ... absolve, ... [...];

o 1010

[d]⸢30⸣

lip-⸢šur⸣ [...]

May Sin absolve, [...];

o 1111

[d]⸢NIN?.GAL⸣

lip-[šur ...]

May Ningal absolve, [...];

(11 lines missing)
o 1'1'

[...]

[lip]-šur ⸢ina⸣ [...] x x [...]

May [...] absolve, in [...] ... [...];

o 2'2'

[...]

⸢lip⸣-šur x x E₂.[...]

May [...] absolve, ... [...];

o 3'3'

[...]

⸢lip⸣-šur [...] IB [...]

May [...] absolve, [...] ... [...];

o 4'4'

[dNIN—NIBRU]ki

lip-šur [...] ⸢ŠA? GAL MA?⸣

May Belet-Nippur absolve, [...] ...;

o 5'5'

[dNIN.GIR₂].SU

lip-šur ina ⸢E₂⸣.[NINNU]

May Ningirsu absolve, in Eninnu;

o 6'6'

[dba]-⸢ba₆⸣

lip-šur ina ⸢E₂⸣.[TAR.SIR₂.SIR₂]

May Baba absolve, in Etarsirsir;

o 7'7'

[dza]-ba₄-ba₄

lip-šur ina ⸢E₂⸣.[ME].⸢TE.UR⸣.[SAG]

May Zababa absolve, in Emeteursag;

o 8'8'

[d]⸢GU.LA⸣

lip-šur ⸢a⸣-x [...] LA x x UD

May Gula absolve, ... [...] ...;

o 9'9'

⸢d⸣URAŠ

lip-šur ina E₂.I.BI₂.dA-NUM!(RU)

May Uraš absolve, in Eibianum;

o 10'10'

dNIN.⸢E₂⸣.GAL

lip-šur ina E₂.SA.PAR₃

May Ninegal absolve, in Esapar;

o 11'11'

d⸢TIŠPAK⸣

⸢lip-šur⸣ ina E₂.SIKIL.LA

May Tišpak absolve, in Esikil;

o 12'12'

du₂KUL.AB

lip-šur šar-rat EŠ₃.NUN.NA⸢ki⸣

May Kulab absolve, queen of Ešnuna;

o 13'13'

dMAŠ

⸢lip⸣-šur ina E₂.⸢DIM⸣.GAL.KALAM.MA

May Ninurta absolve, in Edimgalkalama;

o 14'14'

dPAP.SUKKAL

⸢lip⸣-šur SUKKAL da-nu₃ u diš-tar

May Papsukkal absolve, minister of Anu and Ištar;

o 15'15'

dNERGALₓ(U.GUR)

⸢lip⸣-šur ina E₂.MES.LAM

May Nergal absolve, in Emeslam;

o 16'16'

dma-am-me-tu₄

lip-šur šar-rat GU₂.DU₈.Aki

May Mammetu absolve, queen of Cutha;

o 17'17'

dma-mu₂

lip-šur EN MAŠ₂.GE₆-MEŠ

May Mamu absolve, lord of dreams;

o 18'18'

di-šum

lip-šur SUKKAL dNERGALₓ(U.GUR)

May Išum absolve, minister of Nergal;

o 19'19'

dIN.NIN.NA

lip-šur be-let KUR.KUR

May Innin absolve, mistress of the lands;

o 20'20'

dINANA

lip-šur ina E₂.AN.NA

May Ištar absolve, in Eana;

o 21'21'

dNIN.LIL₂

lip-šur ina E₂.ḪUR.SAG.KALAM.MA

May Ninlil absolve, in Ehursagkalama;

o 22'22'

dINANA A.GA.DE₃⸢ki⸣

lip-šur ina E₂.UL.MAŠ

May Ištar of Akkad absolve, in Eulmaš;

o 23'23'

dNIN.MAḪ

lip-šur ina E₂.NAM.ZU

May Ninmah absolve, in Enamzu;

o 24'24'

⸢dNIN⸣.<I₃>.SI.IN.NA

⸢lip⸣-šur ina E₂.GAL.MAḪ

May Ninisina absolve, in Egalmah;

o 25'25'

DINGIR-[MEŠ] BARA₂-MEŠ eš-re-e-tu ne₂-me-du u ma-ḫa-zu

May the gods of sanctuaries, chapels, base and shrine;

o 26'26'

[...] NENNI

lip-šu-ru a-⸢ra⸣-an-šu₂

[...] absolve the sin of so-and-so.

o 27'27'

itiBARA₂.ZA₃.GAR

⸢lip-šur ša₂⸣ d⸢a-nu₃⸣ [dEN].⸢LIL₂⸣

May Nisannu (month I) absolve, (the month) of Anu and Ellil;

o 28'28'

itiGU₄.SI.SA₂

⸢lip⸣-šur ša₂ de₂-a EN te!(TU-)ne-⸢še-e⸣-ti

May Ayyaru (month II) absolve, (the month) of Ea, lord of mankind;

o 29'29'

itiSIG₄.GA

⸢lip-šur⸣ ša₂ d30 ⸢DUMU reš⸣-ti-e ša₂ dBAD

May Simanu (month III) absolve, (the month) of Sin, foremost son of Ellil;

o 30'30'

itiŠU.NUMUN.NA

⸢lip⸣-šur ša₂ SAG.KAL dNIN.URTA

May Duʾuzu (month IV) absolve, (the month) of the pre-eminent one, of Ninurta;

o 31'31'

itiNE.NE.GAR

⸢lip⸣-šur ša₂ dNIN.GIŠ.ZI.DA EN KIti

May Abu (month V) absolve, (the month) of Ningišzida, lord of the earth;

o 32'32'

itiKIN.dINANA

⸢lip⸣-šur ⸢ša₂⸣ diš-tar GAŠAN KUR.KUR

May Ululu (month VI) absolve, (the month) of Ištar, mistress of the lands;

o 33'33'

itiDU₆.KU₃

⸢lip⸣-šur ša₂ d⸢UTU⸣ qu-ra-di

May Tašritu (month VII) absolve, (the month) of Šamaš, the warrior;

o 34'34'

itiAPIN.DU₈.A

⸢lip-šur⸣ ša₂ EN IDIM ABGAL DINGIR-MEŠ dAMAR.UTU

May Arahsamnu (month VIII) absolve, (the month) of the lord of the underground water, the sage of the gods, Marduk;

o 35'35'

itiGAN.GAN.E₃

⸢lip⸣-šur ša₂ UR.SAG GAL ⸢DUMU⸣ ša₂ dNERGALₓ(U.GUR)

May Kislimu (month IX) absolve, (the month) of the great hero, son of Nergal;

o 36'36'

itiAB.BA.⸢E₃⸣

⸢lip-šur⸣ ša₂ d⸢PAP?.SUKKAL⸣ da-⸢nu₃⸣ [d]⸢INANA?⸣

May Ṭebetu (month X) absolve, (the month) of Papsukkal, Anu (and) Ištar;

Reverse
r 1r 1

[iti]⸢ZIZ₂⸣.A.AN

⸢lip⸣-šur ša₂ d⸢IŠKUR⸣ GU₂.GAL AN⸢e⸣ u KIti₃

May Šabaṭu (month XI) absolve, (the month) of Adad, the irrigation controller of heaven and earth;

r 22

[iti]⸢ŠE⸣.KIN.⸢KU₅⸣

⸢lip-šur⸣ ša₂ d7.BI DINGIR-MEŠ GAL-MEŠ

May Addaru (month XII) absolve, (the month) of the Seven, the great gods.

r 33

[U₄] ⸢1-KAM₂⸣

⸢lip-šur⸣ ša₂ d⸢EN⸣.LIL₂

May the 1st [day] absolve, (the day) of Ellil;

r 44

[U₄ 2]-⸢KAM₂⸣

⸢lip-šur⸣ ša₂ diš₈-⸢tar₂⸣-MEŠ

May [the 2nd day] absolve, (the day) of the goddesses;

r 55

[U₄] ⸢3-KAM₂⸣

⸢lip-šur⸣ nu-bat-⸢tu⸣ ša₂ dAMAR.UTU

May the 3rd [day] absolve, the eve of Marduk's festival;

r 66

[U₄] ⸢4-KAM₂⸣

⸢lip-šur⸣ U₄.EŠ₃.EŠ₃ ša₂ dNA₃

May the 4th [day] absolve, the eššēšu-festival of Nabu;

r 77

[U₄] ⸢5-KAM₂⸣

[lip]-⸢šur⸣ ša₂ EN E₂.KUR

[May] the 5th [day] absolve, (the day) of Ekur's lord;

r 88

[U₄ 6-KAM₂]

[lip]-⸢šur⸣ ša₂ d⸢IŠKUR⸣

[May the 6th day] absolve, (the day) of Adad;

r 99

[U₄ 7]-⸢KAM₂⸣

[lip]-⸢šur nu⸣-[bat]-tu ša de₂-a ana d⸢AMAR.UTU⸣ x GAR

[May the 7th day] absolve, the eve of Ea's festival to Marduk ...;

r 1010

[U₄ 8-KAM₂]

[lip-šur] ⸢U₄.EŠ₃⸣.EŠ₃ ⸢ša₂⸣ dNA₃

[May the 8th day absolve], the eššēšu-festival of Nabu;

r 1111

[U₄ 9]-KAM₂

⸢lip-šur ša₂ dGU.LA⸣

May [the 9th day] absolve, (the day) of Gula;

r 1212

⸢U₄⸣ [10]-KAM₂

⸢lip-šur ša₂ d⸣PAP.⸢SUKKAL⸣

May the [10th] day absolve, (the day) of Papsukkal;

r 1313

U₄ 11-KAM₂

⸢lip-šur ša₂-lam man-zal-ti⸣ ša₂ d⸢zar⸣-pa-ni-tu₄

May the 11th day absolve, completing Zarpanitu's position;

r 1414

U₄ 12-KAM₂

⸢lip⸣-šur ⸢SUM.NIG₂ ša d⸣GU.LA

May the 12th day absolve, the SUM.NIG₂-festival of Gula;

r 1515

⸢U₄⸣ 13-KAM₂

⸢lip⸣-šur ša₂ <<x>> d30

May the 13th day absolve, (the day) of Sin;

r 1616

⸢U₄⸣ 14-KAM₂

⸢lip⸣-šur ša₂ dNIN.LIL₂

May the 14th day absolve, (the day) of Ninlil;

r 1717

⸢U₄ 15⸣-KAM₂

[lip]-⸢šur ša₂⸣ d⸢NIN⸣.E₂.AN.⸢NA⸣

[May] the 15th day absolve, (the day) of Nineana;

r 1818

[U₄ 16]-⸢KAM₂⸣

[lip-šur nu]-⸢bat-tu ša₂ dAMAR.UTU⸣

[May the 16th day absolve], the eve of Marduk's festival;

r 1919

[U₄ 17]-⸢KAM₂⸣

[lip]-⸢šur U₄.EŠ₃.EŠ₃⸣ ša₂ dNA₃

[May the 17th day] absolve, the eššēšu-festival of Nabu;

r 2020

[U₄ 18]-⸢KAM₂⸣

⸢lip-šur EZEN⸣ ḫu-un-ṭi₃ ša₂ dUTU

May [the 18th day] absolve, the humṭu-festival of Šamaš;

r 2121

[U₄ 19-KAM₂]

[lip-šur] ⸢ib-bu⸣-u ša₂ dGU.LA

[May the 19th day absolve], the day of Gula's wrath;

r 2222

[U₄] ⸢20⸣-[KAM₂]

[lip]-⸢šur⸣ ša₂ d[UTU]

[May] the 20th [day] absolve, (the day) of Šamaš;

r 2323

⸢U₄ 21⸣-[KAM₂]

[lip]-⸢šur e-peš⸣ NIG₂.KA₉ ša₂ d30 [...]

[May] the 21th day absolve, making the account of Sin [...];

r 2424

⸢U₄ 22-KAM₂⸣

[lip-šur ...] x

[May] the 22th day [absolve, ...] ...;

r 2525

U₄ 23-KAM₂

[lip]-⸢šur⸣ [...] ša₂ [d]⸢30⸣

[May] the 23th day absolve, [...] of Sin;

r 2626

⸢U₄ 24-KAM₂⸣

[lip]-⸢šur⸣ [... d]⸢GISSU d⸣[NIN].⸢MAḪ⸣

[May] the 24th day absolve, [...] divine shadows of Ninmah;

r 2727

⸢U₄ 25⸣-KAM₂

[lip-šur ...] ⸢d⸣x x [...]

[May] the 25th day [absolve, ...] ... [...];

r 2828

U₄ ⸢26⸣-KAM₂

[lip-šur ...] ⸢SIG₄⸣ d⸢NIN⸣.[MAḪ]

[May] the 26th day [absolve, ...] mudbrick of Ninmah;

r 2929

U₄ ⸢27⸣-KAM₂

[lip-šur me-lul]-tu₂ ša₂ dNERGALₓ(U.GUR)

[May] the 27th day [absolve], the game of Nergal;

r 3030

[U₄ 28-KAM₂]

[lip]-⸢šur⸣ [bi-ib-bu]-⸢lu⸣ ša₂ d30

[May the 28th day] absolve, day of Sin's (the moon) disappearance;

r 3131

[U₄ 29]-⸢KAM₂⸣

[lip]-⸢šur ša₂⸣ d⸢e₂⸣-a

[May the 29th day] absolve, (the day) of Ea;

r 3232

[U₄ 30]-⸢KAM₂⸣

[lip-šur] ⸢ša₂ dAMAR.UTU⸣

[May the 30th day absolve], (the day) of Marduk.

(rest of reverse missing)
